issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Preview Stitch project locally and hand off to coding agent via MCP
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to manual HTML export; treatment uses serve -p, configures the npx proxy MCP server, and invokes build_site/get_screen_code as documented.

scenarios.name: Generate Astro project from Stitch with explicit route mapping
scenarios.rationale: Baseline scaffolds Astro manually; treatment uses the site CLI command or the build_site MCP tool with the documented routes JSON payload.
